features.name: PAD attribute causing disconnected module input ports
features.description: Code should include wire declarations with PAD attribute used in module instantiation with named port connections, where the sub-module has parameterized input ports

features.name: parameterized module with input wire ports
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module with input wire ports of parameterized width, where the module body performs an operation on the inputs
features.snippet:
module addN
   #(parameter WID = 4)
    (input wire [WID-1:0] A,
     input wire [WID-1:0] B,
     output wire [WID:0] Q);
    assign Q = A + B;
endmodule

features.name: module instantiation with named port connections
features.description: Code should include module instantiation using named port connection syntax where wires with PAD attributes are connected to input ports
